title: Crazy Attack 4 Modpack
description: Client-side realism modpack: better graphics, audio, and performance for Minecraft 1.21.5.
body:
## **🛠️ Crazy Attack 4 – A More Realistic Minecraft Experience**
**Crazy Attack 4** is a client-side modpack that enhances immersion, graphics, and performance in Minecraft – ideal for private multiplayer servers or solo play.

## **🔍 Features & Highlights**

### **🌿 Immersion & Realism**

Presence Footsteps, AmbientSounds, Dramatic Skys, Eating Animation, Physics Mod
→ Enjoy realistic sounds, visual effects, and physical interactions.

### **👁️ Visual Enhancements**

Iris Shaders, Complementary Shaders, Distant Horizons, Fancy Beds/Crops, Better Leaves
→ Beautiful shaders, extended render distance, and decorative improvements.

### **⚙️ Performance Boost**

Sodium, Lithium, Entity Culling, Dynamic FPS, FerriteCore
→ Smoother gameplay and better FPS – even on low-end systems.

### **💬 Multiplayer Support**

Simple Voice Chat, InvMove, Chat Heads
→ Built-in voice chat, improved movement, and better chat visuals.

### **🧭 Quality of Life Improvements**

AppleSkin, JourneyMap, BetterF3, Not Enough Animations, Spark
→ Enhanced HUD, minimap, debug tools, and more animations.

## **🎮 Technical Info**
### **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.5

### **Mod Loader:** Fabric

**All mods are client-side only** – no server installation needed!

Works in **single-player and multiplayer**

Built for the **Crazy Attack 4** project, but usable for general play as well.
